_meta.description: All data shapes consumed and produced by the Market screen. Three layers: Firestore document models (written/read from backend), view models (transformed for UI rendering), and state models (local screen state).

MarketOrder._description: Standing buy or sell declaration. Visible to collectors platform-wide as a live demand signal. The org creates these; collectors respond to them.

material.category: enum: plastics | metals | glass | paper_cardboard | rubber_composites | reclaimed_wood | textiles | electronics
material.type: string — e.g. PET Clean, Carrier Bags, HDPE Mixed, Copper Wire
material.grade: string | null — e.g. Grade A, Mixed, Processed, Baled

quantity.filledKg: number — running total as responses are confirmed, starts at 0

zone.zoneIds: array<string> — collectionZone IDs this order covers
zone.zoneLabels: array<string> — denormalized zone labels for display without a join
zone.acceptsDelivery: boolean — org will accept material brought to their hub
zone.willCollect: boolean — org will send a collector to pick up

responses.respondentUids: array<string> — collectors who indicated they can fulfill

MarketOrder.status: enum: active | paused | fulfilled | expired | draft

OrderResponse._description: A collector's response to a buy order. Subcollection of the order.
OrderResponse.offeredKg: number — how much the collector can supply
OrderResponse.status: enum: pending | accepted | rejected | fulfilled | expired

MarketOrderCardVM._description: Transformed shape consumed by the buy/sell order card widget. Computed from MarketOrder. Never written to Firestore.
MarketOrderCardVM.categoryColor: string — hex colour code mapped from material.category, used for card accent
MarketOrderCardVM.quantityFillFraction: number — 0.0 to 1.0, computed as filledKg / maximumKg
MarketOrderCardVM.quantityLabel: string — e.g. 240 kg of 500 kg needed
MarketOrderCardVM.primaryZoneLabel: string | null — first zone label for card display
MarketOrderCardVM.zoneCount: number — total zones, shown as +N if >1
MarketOrderCardVM.statusLabel: string — Active | Paused | Fulfilled | Expired | Draft
MarketOrderCardVM.hasNewResponses: boolean — responses arrived since org last viewed
MarketOrderCardVM.isExpiringSoon: boolean — true if expiresAt within 72 hours
MarketOrderCardVM.expiresInLabel: string | null — e.g. Expires in 2 days

MarketStatStripVM._description: The three-stat summary strip at the top of the Market screen. Aggregated from all org market orders.
MarketStatStripVM.avgPricePerKg: number | null — null if no transactions this month

OrderResponseListVM._description: Shape for the View Responses bottom sheet. One item per collector response.
OrderResponseListVM.availableFromLabel: string | null — e.g. Available from tomorrow
OrderResponseListVM.status: enum: pending | accepted | rejected | fulfilled | expired
OrderResponseListVM.canAccept: boolean — pending && order still active && not fulfilled

EnvMarketScreenState._description: Local state held in EnvMarketScreen StatefulWidget. Not persisted.
EnvMarketScreenState.selectedOrderId: string | null — for View Responses sheet

postOrderDraft._description: Draft state for the Post Order bottom sheet before submission.
postOrderDraft.validationErrors: map<string, string> — fieldName to error message

cardColors._description: AppTheme-derived accent per category for card borders and chips

MaterialTypesByCategory._description: Controlled list of material types per category. Rendered as dropdown options in Post Order flow.
